structure_overview.headline: There is not enough structure information for a reliable overview.
structure_overview.main_observation: There is not enough reliable structure or movement evidence for a safe artist-facing observation.
structure_overview.listening_focus: No reliable structure listening focus can be generated from the available engine data for this track.

technical_overview.headline: The track looks close, but one technical point should be checked before release.
technical_overview.main_observation: Fixture warning used to cover the almost_ready release readiness state.
technical_overview.listening_focus: Listen to the loudest section and check whether the master feels strained, harsh, or clipped.
technical_overview.export_focus: Review the final limiter or export level and leave safer peak headroom.

mix_overview.headline: The mix translation overview is incomplete.
mix_overview.main_observation: There is not enough mix-related analysis data for a reliable overview.
mix_overview.listening_focus: Run or refresh the analysis before making mix-balance decisions.
mix_overview.export_focus: No mix export focus is available from the current data.

listening_guidance.headline: The track looks close, but one technical point should be checked before release.
listening_guidance.what_to_listen_for: Listen to the loudest section and check whether the master feels strained, harsh, or clipped.

evidence.main_observation: Fixture warning used to cover the almost_ready release readiness state.
evidence.export_focus: Review the final limiter or export level and leave safer peak headroom.

listening_guidance.wording_note: Use this as cautious technical listening guidance only. Do not present it as proof of poor mastering, bad mixing, or incorrect artistic decisions.

ai_consultant.note: The analysis engine does not generate live AI consultant text. Local markdown summaries may be generated separately for testing.
